title: Weapons From the Void
description: A small pack of custom modeled weapons
body:
A resource pack for custom **3D Modeled** Weapons using **cit** (Optfine or CIT Resewn for fabric) **Name dependent** models


## The Models

You can change the desired texture by naming any axe or sword with **these specific names**:

>   Katana ✦
> 
>   Dark Katana ✦
>
>   Crucible ✦
> 
>   S-9T (or Shining Night)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/051b2b1f4cf3567ae0d90fe6ecd306e3d34630c8.png)
![Sheathed Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/594e4012981ee43659b11c78f015baac98090904.png)

![Dark Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3bebf7f49c722a5f04e5cf41246f3f2a44cdcb7.png)
![Sheathed Dark Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10feeb9020663288de3b2264586978f432a2886d.png)

![Doom Slayer Crucible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f28ca2f7ffeb53d9549e287481bab6ad9942a52.png)
![Sheathed Crucible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/350aa73bc3884c833b4c5f4fc481a2f43efbc49a.png)

![S-9T](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53457d07fa3db542da1d95fb1aa841e2620da6a9.png)
</details>



Most of these weapons have **sheathed** forms while on offhand, indicated by "**✦**", you can disable the variations by adding **_Unsheathed_** and forcing the offhand variation with _**Sheathed**_ after the name of the sword, following the example:

  - "_Katana Sheathed_"
  - "_Dark Katana Unsheathed_"


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

> ![Renaming Sheathed Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df66cab5bfb7abe26705836e73457f0aad61530c.png)

</details>



_More weapons to be added in the future_

**(W.I.P)**
